# BERVOS

> A family of flexible digital solutions, systems, and open-source packages designed to learn, drive true action, and optimize growth.

## Ecosystem Projects

- [Billio](https://billio.bervos.org/): Collaborative multi-currency and AI-powered Financial Management operating system for families.
- [Chessverse](https://chessverse.bervos.org/): Modern platform to practice chess openings and thousands of puzzles, tracking performance, and available offline.
- [tripitdown](https://tripitdown.bervos.org/): Precision-focused and customizable travel itinerary tool powered by local-guides AI Agents with versions management.
- [Aura](https://aura.bervos.org/): Beautiful free macOS dashboard app turning your Music and Photos libraries into offline, private visual analytics.
- [Scribo](https://scribo.bervos.org/): Master Arabic and Japanese characters and kanas through immersive practice and historical accuracy results.
- [LaresDJ](https://laresdj.bervos.org/): The ultimate virtual community and resource hub for DJs and music producers, offering tutorials, community forums, equipment maps, custom skins, and curated download packs.
- [Pinmage](https://pinmage.bervos.org/): Analyzes scanned photo albums or individual photos using AI to deduce dates and places, writing them directly into native EXIF & GPS image metadata.
- [Tonaly](https://tonaly.bervos.org/): Immersive ear training studio designed for musicians and audiophiles. Develop absolute note recognition, master relative intervals, and unlock deep performance insights.

## Open Source Libraries

- [Robyn](https://github.com/facebookexperimental/Robyn): Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) by Meta Marketing Science.
- [lares](https://github.com/laresbernardo/lares): R package for data science, analytics, and business intelligence.

## Core Information

- [Full LLM Dossier](/llms-full.txt): Deep developer-oriented resource on architecture, philosophy, and detailed project outlines.
